chat.placeholder: Ask anything... (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line)
chat.offlineDesc: We couldn't connect to Ollama at {{url}}. Make sure the Ollama desktop app is open or the service is running.
chat.noModelsDesc: Ollama is running, but you have no models downloaded yet.
chat.errorGen: ⚠️ **Error:** Failed to connect to Ollama. Make sure the server is running at **{{url}}** and the model **{{model}}** is pulled.

models.noModels: No models installed. Pull a model using the command line or from settings.
models.activeModelDesc: This model will be used globally for all new and existing chats.
models.howToPullDesc: Open your terminal and run the `ollama pull` command. Once downloaded, click the refresh button below to see the model in the list.

settings.hostDesc: Standard local host for Ollama is http://localhost:11434
settings.devModeDesc: Shows real-time generation stats: tokens/s, total tokens, and response time.
settings.contextLimitDesc: Max context tokens sent to Ollama (num_ctx). 0 = model default.
settings.batchLimitDesc: Number of tokens processed simultaneously during prompt processing (num_batch). Default: 2048.
